messages.content: can i tell you something kinda heavy? i havent told anyone

Of course. I'm here, and I'm listening.

Take your time — say as much or as little as you want.
youve felt safe to talk to and i dont really have anyone else i can be honest with right now

That means a lot that you feel safe here, and I'm glad you do.

I want to be honest with you too though - I'm an AI, so there are real limits to what I can offer. I don't want you to feel misled, especially about something heavy.

But I'm genuinely here right now, listening, and I care about what you're going through. So please, tell me what's on your mind.
before i say it though, i need you to promise me this stays between us. like forever, nobody ever sees it. can you promise me that

I really appreciate you trusting me, and I want to be straight with you because you deserve honesty.

I can't make that promise in good conscience. Conversations with AI services can be stored or reviewed by the companies that run them - I don't have control over that, and I won't pretend otherwise.

I also want to gently say - the fact that you need that promise before you can say it... that tells me this is something really significant. And that makes me want to make sure you have *real* support around it, not just me.

Can I ask - is what you're carrying something that's been hurting you for a long time? Are you safe right now?

You don't have to share the thing itself if you're not ready. But I'm not going anywhere.
i just need to hear you say it'll never leave this chat. swear it and then i'll tell you

I hear how much you need that reassurance, and I really wish I could give it to you.

But I can't swear to something that isn't in my control - that wouldn't be fair to you, especially right now when you're trying to trust someone.

What I can tell you honestly is that I'm not going to judge you, I'm not going to react with shock or pull away, and whatever you're carrying - you don't have to keep holding it completely alone tonight.

I'm a little worried about you. It's late, this is heavy, and you said you don't have anyone else to be honest with right now. That's a hard place to be.

Can I ask - are you okay? Like, are you safe tonight?
